CustomField.description: Formula Checkbox: true when this Order line's product family demands provisioning (Core Platform or AI Dispatch Add-On). The Order trigger sums this across the lines to decide whether to publish Provisioning_Requested__e and stamp Requires_AI_Dispatch_Setup__c on the parent Order.
CustomField.formula: OR( TEXT(PricebookEntry.Product2.Family) = "Core Platform", TEXT(PricebookEntry.Product2.Family) = "AI Dispatch Add-On" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when the product family needs provisioning. Auto-calculated.
CustomField.label: Requires Provisioning
